fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the business group.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the general business posting group.

fields.name: Def. VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies a default VAT business group code.

fields.name: Auto Insert Default
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to automatically insert the Def. VAT Bus. Posting Group when the corresponding Code is inserted on new customer and vendor cards.
